points: Designed and built full-stack web applications for clients and personal projects that meet business goals and ,
Deployed scalable solutions using modern cloud infrastructure, handling everything from database design to production deployment independently.
Completed a structured backend internship, building and maintaining server-side logic while collaborating with a team on real-world development challenges.
Participated in knowledge-sharing sessions and applied industry best practices in a fast-paced, remote team environment.
Authoring educational articles on web development and programming for one of the world's leading technical education platforms, reaching millions of developers globally.
Translating complex technical concepts into clear, structured tutorials that support learners across different levels of expertise.
Creating in-depth how-to guides and tutorials on tools and frameworks including Django-Tailwind, Glasp, and Pytest, focused on improving developer experience.
Building a consistent personal brand through long-form technical content that drives organic readership and establishes subject matter authority.
Produced articles and general interest content reaching a cumulative audience of over 1 million readers across 40+ published pieces.
Applied SEO techniques to drive organic traffic and maintained consistently high editorial quality and originality throughout the engagement.
